metadata.title: KWERK - The Art of Work
metadata.description: Exceptional workspaces in the heart of Paris 8th arrondissement. Private offices, signature suites and full floors in a unique setting.

hero.title: The Art of Work
hero.subtitle: Exceptional workspaces in the heart of Paris' 8th arrondissement

locations.title: Our addresses
locations.subtitle: Four exceptional addresses in the 8th arrondissement

saint-honore.name: Saint-Honore
saint-honore.description: Our flagship 6,100 sq m space, with a 360° panoramic rooftop, Dana restaurant and 3 sport studios.
saint-honore.highlights: 360° Rooftop (150 ppl), Dana Restaurant, 3 Sport Studios, Barista, Spa & Wellness

messine.name: Messine
messine.description: 4,300 sq m of elegance with 2 rooftops, 2 saunas and a unique flotation cabin.
messine.highlights: 2 Rooftops (100 ppl), 2 Saunas, Flotation Cabin, Barista

madeleine.name: Madeleine
madeleine.description: 5,600 sq m with a 120-seat conference center and 2 sport studios.
madeleine.highlights: Conference Center (120 ppl), 2 Sport Studios, Barista, Wellness

haussmann.name: Haussmann
haussmann.description: 4,200 sq m of biophilic design with 3 modular meeting rooms.
haussmann.highlights: 3 Meeting Rooms (10-40 ppl), Biophilic Design, Barista

executive.name: Executive Offices
executive.description: Private offices for 2 to 20 workstations, fully equipped and customizable. Premium furniture, natural light and included premium services.

suites.name: Signature Suites
suites.description: Spaces for 20 to 50 workstations with bespoke layouts. Own identity, private access and dedicated services for growing teams.

floors.name: Private Floors
floors.description: Full floors for 50 to 200+ workstations for companies seeking total exclusivity and confidentiality. Free layout and custom branding.

dana.name: Dana Restaurant
dana.description: Healthy and gourmet cuisine, freshly prepared daily by our chef. Daily menu, vegetarian options and floor delivery.

barista.name: Barista
barista.description: An in-house professional barista for specialty coffees, teas and hot beverages throughout the day.

sport.name: Sport
sport.description: Over 40 classes per week: yoga, pilates, boxing, HIIT, meditation. Equipped studios and certified coaches.

wellness.name: Wellness
wellness.description: Spa, saunas, flotation cabin and treatments by appointment. A wellness space to recharge body and mind.

culinary.name: Culinary
culinary.description: Cooking classes, tastings, private dinners with starred chefs.

entertainment.name: Entertainment
entertainment.description: Private concerts, shows, themed parties in our spaces.

technical.name: Technical
technical.description: Conferences, seminars, workshops with professional audiovisual equipment.

scenography.name: Scenography
scenography.description: Floral decorations, artistic installations, bespoke staging.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Plan a visit to our spaces
contact.source: How did you hear about us?
contact.success: Message sent successfully! We will get back to you shortly.
contact.error: An error occurred. Please try again or contact us directly.

footer.description: Exceptional workspaces in the heart of Paris.
